title: SetuptoolsDeprecationWarning
content:
## SetuptoolsDeprecationWarning

Base class for warning deprecations in ``setuptools``.

This class is not derived from ``DeprecationWarning``, and as such is visible by default.

### Key Exports

*   `SetuptoolsDeprecationWarning`: A custom warning class.

### Usage

This class is intended to be used as a base for custom deprecation warnings within the setuptools library. Developers can subclass this to create specific warnings related to deprecated features or usage patterns.
